dismissalText.commentary: Ajinkya Rahane c Pandya b Thakur 67 (40b 3x4 5x6 69m) SR: 167.5

dismissalComment.html: Shardul Thakur can do no wrong today! Three overs, three wickets! Rahane falls with the pressure building. Cross-seam full ball outside off. Rahane tries to go inside out but it comes off the toe end. Hardik Pandya at cover back-tracks and takes a simple catch. Rahane falls for 67 off 40, having laid the platform for his team

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green c Rutherford b Thakur 18 (10b 1x4 1x6 18m) SR: 180

dismissalComment.html: dug in short, Green tries to get on top of the bounce and slap but has ended up picking the lone man at deep cover. Green will be livid with himself. Shardul took pace off, and the moment Green hit it he knew the timing was slightly off, and that was enough.

dismissalText.commentary: Ryan Rickelton run out (Roy) 81 (43b 4x4 8x6 82m) SR: 188.37

dismissalComment.html: Muzarabani goes pace off again, and oh wait that's a direct hit and Rickelton is run-out in a bit of bizarre fashion! Rickelton punches this down towards long-off and wants a second, but Tilak sends him back. But as Rickelton turns to get back to the crease at the non-striker's end, he is blocked by Muzarabani, who was trying to get behind the line of the throw from the deep, which ends up hitting the stumps! Rickelton immediately sets off, knowing he was a goner. No complaints there either, as Muzarabani seemingly wasn't intentionally trying to block him. Anukul Roy again with heroics on the field!

dismissalText.commentary: Ryan Rickelton run out (Roy) 81 (43b 4x4 8x6 82m) SR: 188.37

dismissalComment.html: Muzarabani goes pace off again, and oh wait that's a direct hit and Rickelton is run-out in a bit of bizarre fashion! Rickelton punches this down towards long-off and wants a second, but Tilak sends him back. But as Rickelton turns to get back to the crease at the non-striker's end, he is blocked by Muzarabani, who was trying to get behind the line of the throw from the deep, which ends up hitting the stumps! Rickelton immediately sets off, knowing he was a goner. No complaints there either, as Muzarabani seemingly wasn't intentionally trying to block him. Anukul Roy again with heroics on the field!
